result_summary: The runtime-neutral v2 direction is coherent and preserves the existing metadata authority baseline while generalizing the shell-first profile toward shell and Python adapter families. It is now backed by runtime-neutral constraints, example artifacts, a compatibility assessment, a primary unified realization runner, and normalized unified manifest/report contracts.
passes: existing metadata model remains the authority baseline
runtime assets are classified as projection-only
shell and Python implementation adapters are separated by runtime family
shell and Python verification consumers are separated by runtime family
jsonargparse is named as the first Python implementation adapter target
runtime-neutral cli_role-based constraints exist and validate against a dedicated schema
runtime-neutral semantic and projection example artifacts exist
compatibility assessment classifies the v2 refactor as compatible with migration
a runtime-neutral realization payload exists for adapter-facing follow-on slices
a realization workflow contract exists for deterministic projection engineering
the first concrete Bashly target is wired to the upstream minimal example
the first Bashly minimal transform emits deterministic source surfaces and is covered by local tests
the first jsonargparse minimal transform emits deterministic source surfaces and is covered by local tests
a broader realization runner now orchestrates the bounded Bashly and jsonargparse slices into one unified build tree
the unified realization runner is explicitly the primary operator surface for this lane
the bounded emitters are treated as internal projection surfaces rather than operator authority
the unified realization manifest and report contracts now exist as explicit schema artifacts
verification projections are emitted under runner ownership rather than as separate operator surfaces
runner-owned verification projections are synthesized from canonical verification semantics instead of copied from child-emitter test sources
next_actions: promote the unified manifest/report schemas into the next amendment-facing realization packet when this lane is packetized again
open the Git-substrate adapter-contract lane for gix and sem on top of the now-stabilized realization pattern
